Uses of Class
recoder.java.declaration.ClassDeclaration

Packages that use ClassDeclaration
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl
RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project.
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.pattern
This package contains classes that model design patterns; it is far from being stable and will be subject to changes.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.

    Method
    Description

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(ClassDeclaration child, StatementBlock parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.

    Methods in recoder.kit.pattern with parameters of type ClassDeclaration
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Factory.addFactoryMethods(ClassDeclaration decl)
    Creates factory methods for the public constructors of the given class and adds the corresponding MethodDeclarations to the class declaration.
    Constructors in recoder.kit.pattern with parameters of type ClassDeclaration
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Factory(ClassDeclaration factoryClass, List<TypeDeclaration> products)
    Adds factory methods to the class for all public constructors in the given types.
     
    FactoryMethod(ClassDeclaration product)
    Creates a factory method using the default constructor of the product.
